enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Desingu Raja?

The lead roles are portrayed by Vimal and Bindu Madhavi.

Who composed the music for the song Ammadi Ammadi?

The music was composed by the talented D Imman.

What is the theme of the song Ammadi Ammadi?

The song is a romantic melody that beautifully expresses love and affection.

When was the movie Desingu Raja released?

The movie was released in the year 2013.

Who penned the lyrics for Ammadi Ammadi?

The lyrics were written by the renowned lyricist Yugabharathi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ammadi Ammadi from the 2013 Tamil movie Desingu Raja, starring Vimal and Bindu Madhavi, is a delightful romantic melody. Sung by the melodious Shreya Ghoshal and composed by D Imman, the song captures the essence of love and affection. The lyrics, penned by Yugabharathi, beautifully convey the emotions of longing and connection between the lead characters. This track is a perfect blend of soothing music and heartfelt lyrics, making it a favorite among Tamil music enthusiasts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ammadi Ammadi, a melodious and romantic track from the movie Desingu Raja, showcases the enchanting vocals of Shreya Ghoshal. Composed by the talented D Imman, this song beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly complements the film's vibrant narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Come, look at someone who is nearby.
Come, let’s bloom in the bed of dreams.
Come, you start and don’t leave me behind.
Come, let’s meet the one who has fallen.. let’s listen to the night hey hey.. hey hey..
I don’t know how to be a woman, I always feel like a woman because of you.
Can we stay together in this work that is fading away?
After knowing the details, it’s only mistakes that happen, what is this, what is this, my thief, don’t answer hey hey.. hey hey..
Come, look at someone who is nearby.
Come, let’s bloom in the bed of dreams.
Even if you don’t say anything, my heart gets lost in you.
Even if you say it, your little ones don’t listen.
All these clothes and pride are fading away.
What is the need for a reason, the heart is listening.
It gathers, it gathers, the trouble is that it is getting worse hey hey.. hmm.. hmm
Come, look at someone who is nearby.
Come, let’s bloom in the bed of dreams.
Come, you start and don’t leave me behind.
Come, let’s meet the one who has fallen.. let’s listen to the night hey hey.. hey hey..
